program: Arcanea Deployment Stabilization + Agent Quality Enforcement
goals: Unify CI/runtime parity across local, GitHub Actions, and Vercel
Eliminate preventable AI slop and enforce standards for all agents
Create explicit execution plans with owner and verification per item
currentWorkstream: Push emergency deploy fixes to production/main
Align package and lockfile dependency resolution for Supabase
Standardize Node 20 + pnpm workflows in CI
blockers: Vercel redeploy verification is still pending after latest push
Repository has broad pre-existing type and style debt outside immediate deploy path

codex: Monitor next Vercel build and patch any next blocking error immediately
Implement slop lint guardrails and attach to quality gate
claude: Refactor legacy inline-style-heavy pages into design-token-compliant components
Drive docs and handoff discipline for new standards
opencode: Create automation checks for PR DoD fields (risk, verification, rollback)
